nasb.text: The length of each curtain shall be thirty cubits, and the width of each curtain four cubits; the eleven curtains shall have the same measurements.

esv.text: The length of each curtain shall be thirty cubits, and the breadth of each curtain four cubits. The eleven curtains shall be the same size.

cnv.text: 每幅幔子要長十三公尺，寬兩公尺，十一幅幔子都要一樣的尺寸。

ccb.text: 每幅长十三米、宽两米。十一幅幔子的尺寸都要一样。
